summary: Frontend-only UI testing completed for Linea Pilates Expo React Native app. All public screens (login, register, country picker) tested successfully. Design system compliance verified. All text in Bosnian language. Cannot test authenticated flows without valid credentials on external API.

minor.issue: CORS policy blocks requests with credentials mode 'include' from external API at https://pilates-studio-19.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/me. This is expected behavior for external API and handled gracefully by the app.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test actual login/register flows without valid credentials on external API. App connects to https://pilates-studio-19.preview.emergentagent.com/api which requires real user accounts.

react_native_issues.issue: Using deprecated shadow* style props. Should migrate to boxShadow for React Native web compatibility. Not blocking functionality.

action_items: Consider migrating shadow* props to boxShadow for future React Native compatibility
Update package versions: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage to 2.2.0, react-native-svg to 15.12.1 (optional, not blocking)
To test authenticated flows, provide valid test credentials for external API or mock the API responses
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, etc.)
✓ All text wrapped in Text components
✓ Design system properly defined and used throughout (Colors, Fonts, Sizes, Spacing)
✓ All text in Bosnian language as required
✓ Proper error handling and loading states
✓ Country picker with search functionality works correctly
✓ Form validation present in login and register screens
✓ Proper use of SafeAreaInsets for notch/status bar handling
✓ KeyboardAvoidingView used for better mobile UX
✓ Touch targets adequate (44x44 minimum for buttons)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All testable UI elements working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only Expo React Native app connecting to an EXISTING external backend API at https://pilates-studio-19.preview.emergentagent.com/api. The local backend at port 8001 is NOT used. All public screens (login, register, country picker) are working correctly. Authenticated screens (tabs, sub-screens) cannot be tested without valid credentials on the external API. The app is well-structured, follows React Native best practices, uses proper design system, and all text is in Bosnian language. CORS issue with external API is expected and handled gracefully. Minor deprecation warnings for shadow* props are not blocking.

country_picker.functionality: Modal opens, search works, selection works, close works

untested_features: Actual login flow (requires valid credentials on external API)
PIN screen (requires phone number check to pass)
Tab navigation (Početna, Termini, Paketi, Profil) - requires authentication
Home screen with hero card, memberships, trainings
Schedule screen with date strip and time slots
Profile screen with user info and stats
Sub-screens: treninzi, tezina, obavjestenja, clanarine - all require authentication
external_api_note: The app connects to an external backend API at https://pilates-studio-19.preview.emergentagent.com/api. This API is outside the scope of this testing environment. CORS issues are expected when using credentials mode 'include' from a different origin. The app handles this gracefully by showing the login screen when authentication fails.
